content.headline: Augusta Country Club Pint Glass
content.description_html:
Raise a glass to Augusta Country Club, where 18 holes of Georgia golf await. Located on Washington Road in Augusta, this classic layout delivers a full day of play across 6,287 yards of well-maintained fairways and greens.

Whether you're working through the Ogilvie tees, splitting the difference with Ogilvie/Harison, or testing yourself from the back, there's a line for every skill level. Par 72 means you know what you're chasing—and Augusta gives you plenty of holes to find your rhythm.

This laser-etched pint glass is the perfect way to commemorate your round. Durable, distinctive, and ready for the 19th hole.
bullets: Three tee options: Ogilvie, Ogilvie/Harison, and Harison
Plan for roughly 3.5 hours of play
